title: Colombia and Venezuela Hold Key Diplomatic Talks Following Maduro Visit
detail: Colombia and Venezuela held significant diplomatic talks following Maduro's recent visit to Bogotá, signaling a post-Maduro regional realignment and a shift in bilateral relations under new Venezuelan leadership. The talks reflect broader Latin American efforts to reintegrate Venezuela diplomatically and address the ongoing migration crisis.

media.caption: Colombia-Venezuela diplomatic talks signal post-Maduro regional realignment
